<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/documents/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



## DELETE /api/v1/documents/\{id\}

Permanently deletes a document and its associated file from storage. This endpoint is password protected.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
